Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 40 

PLAN_PBP_REC_NUM 

LABEL: Plan Benefit Package ID 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique plan benefit package (PBP) identifier for the beneficiary’s Part D plan of 
record for the year. CMS assigns an identifier to each PBP within a contract that a Part D plan sponsor 
has with CMS.
